data.body: TS3 (117b) CODE DONE + folded. Plan PASS+signed after 3 rounds (13 blocking R1: signer_pubkey-from-boolean-verify, wrong-schema conflation, position-type mismatch, _ScopedEvent refactor, create_placeholder re-export; 2 blocking R2: identify_signer None-policy contradiction -> resolved to record signer_pubkey=null + bad-signature, never omit). Held-out TDD: 1 happy + 6 held-out ALL GREEN: ledger schema {event_uuid,content_hash,signature,signer_pubkey,position:{commit_sha,position}} + verify-from-ledger-ALONE, key_not_valid_at_era for revoked key, bad-signature forged (live + compacted null-signer), verify_signature_result.schema UNTOUCHED, create_placeholder importable+idempotent. Implementer recovered author_id from DSSE keyid (ledger drops author_id). Fixed 2 mypy errors (commit_sha None fail-closed guard) + 3 E501 (incl _state.py TS2-conflict comment). Teeth confirmed (neutralized verify_authorship_any_key -> key_not_valid_at_era RED). GIT: folded into 3183 -> 3183'=fdc0dbb38 (change 580, Change-Id I0cbe6425 preserved, rebar-ticket->117b); rebased 4b5b onto it (clean). FULL HEAD now COHERENT: 1479 identity/authorship/reducer/compact/verify tests PASS + make lint + make typecheck GREEN. Stack: ddbe/4e9d/bde5'(561)/e165'(563)/264f/2f13/3183'(580)/4b5b(581). NEXT: TS4 (b134) docs rewrite -> 4b5b (change 581), then push corrected stack + land.
